Description: Summon forth your snowstreamer. Guaranteed not to inconveniently melt while you are inside.
Description{Enhanced}: Hollow on the inside and sustained by the power of eternal ice, this snowman garbed in fetching purple promises to keep its rider cool even in the hottest of climes. Rumor holds it is the perfect companion for those who wish to share their adventures with others, as well as those who wish to cheer others along on theirs.
Tooltip:
There's something strange about
these snowmen, yes, but...I can't
quite put my finger on it.
   - Isainne
